figures.gloss: 'We are those of Ra' — a sixth-density social memory complex that says it evolved on Venus and last walked Earth in Egypt, where it helped raise pyramids as instruments of initiation and healing before its teaching curdled into sun-cult and priestcraft. It returned, it says, to correct that distortion with a single message: all things are one Creator.
figures.facet: A god that files an erratum: Ra presents itself not as a deity demanding worship but as a 'humble messenger' making amends for the religion founded in its name — revelation delivered in the key of apology.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, sessions 1-106 (L/L Research, 1981-84), esp. sessions 1, 2, 14, and 23; The Ra Material (Donning, 1984).

figures.gloss: The protocol of the Louisville sessions: Don Elkins questioning, Carla Rueckert in unconscious trance lending her voice, Jim McCarty scribing — the working 'tuned' before each session with a Bible opened to the Gospel of John, a lit candle, incense, and a chalice of water. 106 sessions, January 1981 to March 1984.
figures.facet: Channeling disciplined into laboratory method: fixed apparatus, repeatable procedure, and a physics professor as interrogator — the transcripts read like experiment logs, numbered question by question.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, Book I introduction (L/L Research); Carla Rueckert's autobiographical accounts; the lawofone.info session archive.

figures.gloss: Seven densities of consciousness plus an eighth that begins the next octave, each a literal 'density' of light: first density the cycle of elemental awareness, third the density of self-aware choice that humans occupy, sixth the density from which Ra speaks. Progress is measured in light, not virtue.
figures.facet: The load-bearing wall of the modern ascension lexicon: 'third density', 'fourth-density Earth', and the pop-esoteric '5D' all trace to this scheme, usually with no memory of the source.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 13, 16, 20, and 40-41 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: Third density exists for one decision: polarization in service to others or service to self. Both polarities graduate and both are named paths to the one Creator — though the negative road, Ra states, cannot be walked past mid-sixth density, where it must at last be surrendered.
figures.facet: Evil is granted a valid visa but a finite one: the adversarial path becomes a legitimate, temporary curriculum inside unity rather than a rival kingdom — dualism dissolved into pedagogy.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 17 and 19-20 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: The graduation at the close of a 75,000-year master cycle, when each soul is measured by the polarity of its 'violet ray' and either passes onward or repeats the grade. Ra placed Earth's harvest around 2011, with the planet birthing a fourth-density world of love and understanding.
figures.facet: The wellspring of ascension eschatology: much of the 2012-era 'ascension' discourse is this concept with the serial numbers filed off, carried outward from the Ra Material through the online esoteric commons.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 6, 14, 17, and 40 (L/L Research, 1981-84); the c. 2011 dating is given in session 6.

figures.gloss: The destiny-form of a matured species: a planetary population fused into a single being whose every memory and experience is available to all without erasing individual facets. Ra is one; the Confederation of Planets in the Service of the Infinite Creator is a federation of them.
figures.facet: It literalizes the Law of One sociologically — enlightenment is not a private summit but a species-scale merger, the noosphere become a person.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 6, 11, and 14 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: The sole reality behind the octave of densities: an undifferentiated 'intelligent infinity' that free-willingly focuses itself into 'intelligent energy' through a hierarchy of Logoi — each galaxy a Logos, each sun a sub-Logos — each level free to elaborate the laws of physics and biology within it. Every density, entity, and choice is held to be this one Creator experiencing itself.
figures.facet: A creator defined entirely by withdrawal of decree: it legislates nothing directly, delegating all design work downward through a chain of lesser Logoi, so that 'the Law of One' names not a commandment but a metaphysical fact to be discovered rather than obeyed.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 1, 27, and 41 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: Souls who matured in fourth, fifth, or sixth density and volunteered to incarnate into third-density Earth to be of service during the run-up to harvest, accepting the same veil of forgetting as native souls and so risking confusion, depression, and a body poorly tuned to alien vibrations. Ra estimates some 65 million on Earth at the time of the sessions and calls them the 'Brothers and Sisters of Sorrow.'
figures.facet: Ra frames spiritual amnesia as the price of the mission, not a flaw in it: the Wanderer's usefulness depends on forgetting exactly what a native third-density soul forgets, so higher origin offers no exemption from the confusion it was sent to help relieve.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 12, 36, and 65 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: The service-to-self social memory complexes of the Orion constellation, the negative-pole mirror of the Confederation, offering 'conquest'-flavored contact to civilizations it can dominate and, per the sessions' own record, launching repeated 'psychic greeting' attacks against the Ra contact itself, at one point forcing Rueckert's hospitalization.
figures.facet: Evil with an org chart: rather than formless chaos, Ra describes a second, mirror-image federation, as organized and as service-oriented in its own polarity as the Confederation is in the other — negation with a working bureaucracy.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 7, 17, and 19-20 (L/L Research, 1981-84); Carla Rueckert's accounts of the sessions' 'psychic greeting' incidents.

figures.gloss: A body seated in Saturn's rings, described as composed of higher-density beings who have taken on the office of administering the quarantine placed on Earth after prior contact abuses, and through which Confederation entities including Ra sought and received permission to speak with L/L Research.
figures.facet: Free will made bureaucratic: even a sixth-density teacher claiming direct access to intelligent infinity still has to clear its outreach through a permissions desk, so that non-interference operates less like a cosmic taboo than a chartered regulatory function.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, esp. sessions 6-7 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: A deliberate barrier instituted partway through third density, separating the conscious mind from the unconscious/higher-self so that incarnate choice is made under uncertainty rather than direct knowledge of spiritual law — without it, Ra states, polarization toward service-to-self or service-to-others could not develop, since the outcome would be too obvious to constitute a real choice.
figures.facet: Ignorance re-engineered as the condition for freedom: rather than a fall to be undone, forgetting is presented as a designed feature installed to protect the integrity of choice itself.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, developed at length from session 82 onward (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: A 22-image structure Ra describes as the Logos's blueprint for the mind, body, and spirit's evolution, offered as a training tool to Egyptian initiates and said to survive, heavily distorted, as the tarot's major arcana; sessions 76-105 work through the images in extended, image-by-image detail.
figures.facet: A revelation that spends its final act auditing its own corruption: Ra devotes more session-time to this teaching than to any other, treating the recovery of a distorted transmission as itself the central pedagogical act.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, sessions 76-105 (L/L Research, 1981-84).

figures.gloss: The three-person instrument the contact required: Elkins, a physics professor and UFO researcher, framed and asked the questions; Rueckert, in unconscious trance, lent her voice; McCarty scribed and monitored her vital signs. Elkins's death in November 1984 ended the contact for good.
figures.facet: A revelation with named, ordinary co-authors: unlike scriptures that erase their human transmitters, the Ra Material insists on the specific, fallible three-person circuit — one dead of natural causes, ending the canon by exhausting its only working apparatus.
figures.provenance: The Law of One, Book I introduction (L/L Research, 1981); Carla L. Rueckert's autobiographical writings; the lawofone.info session archive.

edges.note: The same attested practice and era — deep-trance vocal channeling in the American milieu of Seth and Ramtha; L/L Research names its own work channeling, adding an experimental discipline to it.

Reinterpretation, not descent: the 1981 entity claims to be the misremembered referent of Egyptian sun-worship — an identification made by the channel three millennia after the cult, running backward from Louisville to Heliopolis.
Two datings of the same expected planetary graduation; the Ra Material's harvest-and-densities vocabulary demonstrably fed the later New Age ascension discourse around 2012.

Both are benevolent interplanetary councils from the attested contactee milieu: Elkins built the Ra experiment on channeling protocols inherited from 1950s contactee circles, as Book I's introduction documents.
Both grade reality by frequency and make spiritual progress a climb through vibratory strata.
Intra-tradition bond: the sole reality and the sixth-density messenger who serves it as a self-described 'humble messenger of the Law of One.'
Intra-tradition bond: souls who incarnate specifically to help prepare Earth for its graduation at the harvest.
Intra-tradition bond: the organized service-to-self actor whose contact embodies the negative pole of the Choice.
Intra-tradition bond: the administrative center through which the Confederation's federation of social memory complexes clears its contact with Earth.
Intra-tradition bond: the design feature that makes third-density polarization a matter of faith rather than certainty.
Intra-tradition bond: Ra's own claimed teaching-gift to Egypt, the last major body of material the contact delivered.
Intra-tradition bond: the three-person circuit and the tuned rite they ran together for 106 sessions.
Both posit a single undifferentiated absolute from which a graded hierarchy of intelligences (Logoi / Nous, Psyche) emanates without diminishing the source.
Structural parallel: an impersonal, all-encompassing absolute of which every individual consciousness and every level of reality is held to be a manifestation.
Both name an advanced being who postpones full liberation/return to a higher state in order to incarnate among the less advanced and serve their awakening.
Both are contactee-milieu figures for a negative extraterrestrial/celestial actor whose interference with Earth corrupts a otherwise-benevolent cosmic administration.

Both are hierarchical command structures from the same mid-20th-century contactee milieu that regulate benevolent extraterrestrial contact with Earth; Elkins built the Ra protocol directly on inherited contactee-circle channeling practice.
Both frame ordinary waking consciousness as cut off from awareness of a higher identity, with spiritual work consisting of piercing or lifting that separation rather than acquiring anything new.

Ra's own emic claim, made within the sessions, to have originated the tarot's 22 images in ancient Egypt — an assertion of the tradition itself, not a historically documented lineage (surviving tarot decks are attested only from 15th-century Italy).
Both are trance-channeling circuits of the same American esoteric milieu and decade, though Ra's is a deliberately 'tuned' three-person apparatus rather than a single channel working alone.

dossier.essence: The Law of One, or Ra Material, is a channeled corpus received in 106 trance sessions at L/L Research in Louisville, Kentucky (January 1981 – March 1984) by Carla Rueckert (instrument), Don Elkins (questioner), and Jim McCarty (scribe) from 'Ra,' self-described as a sixth-density 'social memory complex' that once influenced ancient Egypt. Its central claim is that all things are one infinite Creator, and that consciousness evolves through graded 'densities' toward reunion with it. Its following is a diffuse study-group and online milieu rather than an organized church, but its vocabulary saturates later ascension discourse.
dossier.cosmos: One infinite Creator differentiates into an octave of seven densities of consciousness, with an eighth beginning the next octave; humans occupy third density, the 'density of choice,' whose purpose is polarization toward service to others or service to self. At death the soul is reviewed and reincarnates within its density until 'harvest,' the graduation at the close of a 75,000-year master cycle — which Ra dated to around 2011 for Earth — when it passes to a fourth-density world or repeats the grade. Matured planetary populations fuse into social memory complexes, of which Ra claims to be one, within a Confederation of Planets in the Service of the Infinite Creator.
dossier.practice: There is no clergy, congregation, or sacrament; the tradition's one rite was the contact protocol itself — each session 'tuned' with a Bible opened to the Gospel of John, a lit candle, incense, and a chalice of water, and conducted with laboratory regularity. Practice today means study: reading and discussion groups, L/L Research's continuing meditation and channeling circles, and the searchable session archive at lawofone.info. The ethic asks seeking, service to others, and strict respect for free will.
dossier.canon: The 106 session transcripts, first published as The Ra Material (Donning, 1984) and issued by L/L Research as The Law of One, Books I–V; the complete text is maintained online at lawofone.info.
dossier.reflects: The drive to give revelation the procedures of science — channeling run as a repeatable experiment, with a physics professor asking the questions.
sources: Don Elkins, Carla Rueckert, and James McCarty, 'The Ra Material / The Law of One' (1984)
David G. Robertson, 'UFOs, Conspiracy Theories and the New Age: Millennial Conspiracism' (2016)

links.cite: Don Elkins, Carla Rueckert, and James McCarty, 'The Ra Material / The Law of One' (1984)
